notes: Great trend continuation play. My classic model. Established the intra-day trend by analyzing market structure. I then waited for a pull-back into the first OTE zone. Toke the market long and ran it all the way to external highs.

This was a short-term scalp. I wanted to buy a low sweep and target the internal highs. The idea was solid but it's not really my strategy. In hindsight, I probably shouldn't have executed this. I should've waited for my own strategy to appear.

The market was ranging, I bought the bottom of the range when the market ran below it. I was looking to capitalize on the potential cash-grab at lows and then a rally to the high of the range. Unfortunately, it didn't play out.

Todays market was ranging on the hourly time-frame. I zoomed into a 5 minute time-frame, found another range, patiently waited for a breakout. When I got a 5-minute candle closure above the range high, I went long immediately targeted highs at 70000 for a liquidity grab.
